column1: # zenpng encode peak-memory sweep — admission-safety recalibration
# probe: examples/mem_probe_encode.rs (release), one process per cell
# grid: size {256,512,1024,2048} x effort {1,6,13,19,24,30} x content {img=photo,shot=screenshot} x threads {1,4}, quality 85, RGB8
# note: effort>=31 (Brag/Minutes, zopfli/FullOptimal) SKIPPED — very slow; e30 is a lower bound there.
# model_cols (model_typ/min/max_kb) are the CURRENT-at-sweep-time est BEFORE recalibration; safety_typ_over_vmhwm<1.0 = unsafe under-prediction.
# fit: src/heuristics.rs ENCODE_FIXED_OVERHEAD 6->8 MiB; ENCODE_BPP_ANCHORS raised to (1,18)(6,57)(13,102)(19,124)(24,125)(30,180); +~10% margin; post-fit worst safety 1.04, 0 under, loosest 2.26x.
